---
name: Schema question
about: How do I extend / adapt the schema for X?
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question, schema
---

## What are you trying to do?

The actual workflow / outcome you want — e.g. "I want my ingest to also push the lit note title into Notion."

## Which workflow are you extending?

- [ ] Ingest
- [ ] Query
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] MOC Creation
- [ ] Log Rotation
- [ ] Promotion
- [ ] Other / not sure

## What have you tried?

Modifications to `CLAUDE.md`, Claude Code commands you tested, what happened.

## Relevant context

Snippets from your modified `CLAUDE.md`, error messages, the part of `System Reference - How This Vault Works.md` that seems related.
